settings.title: AI settings
settings.imageGenerationEnabledHelp: When enabled, image generation can run across the admin app.
settings.imageGenerationDisabledHelp: When disabled, image generation requests are blocked across the admin app.
settings.enrichGenerationEnabledHelp: When enabled, example and translation generation can run across the admin app.
settings.enrichGenerationDisabledHelp: When disabled, example and translation generation requests are blocked across the admin app.

addVoca.title: Add Vocabulary
addVoca.dropzone: Drag & drop a CSV file here, or click to select
addVoca.invalidCoursePath: This course is not configured for uploads yet. Please check the course path settings.
addVoca.noDayName: Set a day name for each item before uploading.
addVoca.validationHeaderRequired: A header row is required for this course format.
addVoca.validationHeaderMismatch: CSV/Sheet columns do not match the selected course format.
addVoca.validationCrossHeaderRow: Detected a header row from a different course format in the data rows.
addVoca.queueClearedOnCourseChange: Pending CSV/URL items were cleared because the selected course changed.
addVoca.googleNotConfigured: Google Client ID is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to enable Sheets import.
addVoca.overwriteMessage: The following days already have data in the database:
addVoca.uploadOptionsDescription: Select any generation steps to run before uploading.
addVoca.generateImagesUnsupported: Image generation is only available for CSAT, IELTS, TOEFL, TOEIC, and Collocations.
addVoca.generateImagesDisabled: Image generation is disabled in AI settings.
addVoca.generateEnrichDisabled: Example and translation generation is disabled in AI settings.
addVoca.generateImagesPermissionDenied: Your administrator account cannot run image generation.
addVoca.generateEnrichPermissionDenied: Your administrator account cannot run example and translation generation.
addVoca.derivativePreviewEmpty: No adjective derivatives were found. The original words will be uploaded as usual.
addVoca.derivativePreviewPartial: Some words could not be analyzed. You can still continue with the available results.
addVoca.imageGeneratorDescription: Generate and save a black-and-white stick figure for a single exam-course vocabulary word.
addVoca.imageGeneratorSuccess: The image was generated and saved. The URL is ready to copy.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorUnauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorUnsupportedCourse: Image generation is only available for CSAT, IELTS, TOEFL, and TOEIC.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorDisabled: Image generation is disabled in AI settings.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorPermissionDenied: Image generation is disabled for your administrator account.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorModelBlocked: The model blocked this prompt. Try a simpler word.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorNoImage: The model did not return an image. Please try again.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorUploadFailed: The image was generated, but saving it failed. Please try again.
addVoca.imageGeneratorErrorInternal: Image generation failed. Please try again.
addVoca.imageGeneratorDisabled: Image generation is disabled in AI settings.
addVoca.imageGeneratorPermissionDenied: Image generation is disabled for your administrator account.
addVoca.filenameMismatch: The file name does not include the course name ({{courseLabel}}). Please use a file intended for this course.
addVoca.quoteLangError: Quote does not appear to be in the selected language.

words.title: Word Finder
words.description: Search vocabulary across courses, days, and content types.
words.searchPlaceholder: Search by exact word, collocation, or quote text
words.enterCriteria: Enter a search term or apply at least one filter to search vocabulary.
words.noResults: No vocabulary matched the current search.
words.resultsLimited: Only the first 200 matches are shown. Narrow the search to inspect more results.
words.sharedSectionDescription: Choose an existing {{field}} value from the same entry in another course.
words.generateRequiresMeaning: Generation is only available when the entry has a meaning.
words.imageUploadUnavailable: This entry cannot accept an uploaded image here.
words.pronunciationUnavailable: This entry cannot generate pronunciation here.
words.pronunciationGenerationUnavailableForPhr: Pronunciation generation is only available for single-word entries.
words.translationGenerationUnavailableForQuote: Translation generation is not available for famous quotes in this modal.

words.addFuriganaUnavailable: This entry does not have text that can be converted with furigana here.
